entry.title: Re: Even though the program is active and can be run, the...
entry.content:
Hi Yalcin,

 

there is a note which explains this error for another report, but you just have to try the same instead of SAPLSEOP you do it for your report.

 

Note: 2017410 - GEN_INCLUDE_NOT_EXEC for ABAP Program SAPLSEOP or SAPLSEDI_ACTIVATE

https://me.sap.com/notes/0002017410

 

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: sap hana certification
entry.content:
Dear @Margit_Wagner ,

When will C_HAMOD certification be available? As of now, I do not see any certifications for SAP HANA. 

Regards,

Priyanka

entry.title: Re: material master data field "mat.grouping"
entry.content:
This field is used while creating a new material, and it is a way of grouping together several materials or services with the same attributes for more straightforward reporting, consolidation and analysis.

The "Material Grouping" field provides flexibility on how you categorize and manage groups of your materials, but it isn't mandatory, and there isn't check take place for this field.

entry.title: Re: Result recording is not updating/Overwriting the batc...
entry.content:
Hi Arjuna,

First of all thanks a lot for your continuous support and involvement in this.

The resolution, explained in the note 2627115, was already maintained for the characteristics - i.e., additional values check box ticked. 

Also, business tried to change the value via MSC2N, and it was allowing to change the same. Only issue is , it's not getting updated via Inspection Lot RR.

entry.title: Variant management & View functionality
entry.content:
Hello ,

I was reading the functionality of variant management, i have a small doubt that the View creation (in process manager) and the Variant management seems to be it similar.

just to clarify want to know what are the different Usses of both the functionality   SAP Signavio Process Manager   SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub

entry.title: Missing handling unit (but the HU number shows up in the document flow)
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I'm having this strange situation where I cannot access HU information from either the delivery document or via HU03.

 

When I try to access via "Display document" button in the document flow, I get no response.

When I try to access the HU information via HU03, I get "Handling units could not be found. Check for typing errors " message.

 

The HU number does show up in the document flow of this delivery document and since we have a change history which suggests that we have once packed items in this delivery document, the HU did exist in the past.

I'd appreciate it if you could tell me why this is occurring?

I'd also appreciate it if you could tell me if it's possible to access deleted handling units via some tables/transaction codes. I could not find this handling units in VEKP/VEPO tables. So I'm assuming that the information was deleted from those tables.

 

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024
entry.content: Thanks ! @sveabecker. I did it long back and finger crossed to be a part of this year too.

entry.title: Re: Implement consumption specific behavior in ABAP RAP
entry.content:
Great post. Thank you for sharing!
Another syntax to directly modify using EML which I tried and worked is - 

MODIFY AUGMENTING ENTITY ZI_SuperSessionChoice
              CREATE FIELDS ( SupersessionType channel validfrom )
              WITH VALUE #( FOR ls_entity IN entities  (
                                 %cid       = ls_entity-%cid
                                 %key       = ls_entity-%key
                                 %is_draft  = ls_entity-%is_draft
                                 SupersessionType = zcl_supersession_helper=>gc_ss_type-choice
                                 channel = zcl_supersession_helper=>gc_channel-both
                                 validfrom = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( )
                                 %control-SupersessionType = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                 %control-channel = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                 %control-ValidFrom = if_abap_behv=>mk-on ) ).

entry.title: Re: Even though the program is active and can be run, the system gives an error .

entry.title: Re: Even though the program is active and can be run, the system gives an error .
entry.content: Don't forget to search the forum and SAP notes, I can find answers at both places.

entry.title: The Future Does Not Fit in the Containers of the Past
entry.content:
Explore the transformative impact of technology in our global society with Rishad Tobaccowala's compelling keynote at the SAP Enterprise Architects 2024 Forum. Delve into the critical shifts in demographics, power, and mindsets that shape our future. Tobaccowala challenges us to rethink leadership and innovation strategies to thrive in an ever-changing technological landscape.

Main Recommendations from AI

These recommendations aim to guide individuals and organizations in navigating the complexities of a shifting global landscape.

 

  • Embrace Change: Encourage continuous learning and adaptation to stay relevant in a rapidly changing world.

 

  • Develop a Growth Mindset: Cultivate flexibility, resilience, and openness to new ideas.

 

  • Leverage Technology Wisely: Utilize technology, especially AI, to enhance human capabilities rather than replace them.

 

  • Prioritize Human Connection: Despite technological advances, maintain focus on human-centric values and relationships.

 

  • Lead with Vision and Empathy: Leadership should combine forward-thinking with empathy and effective communication to navigate through change.

 

On Upgrading Our Mental Operating Systems:

 

  • Spend an hour every day learning: Emphasizes the importance of dedicating time to learning every day to stay ahead of changes and not fall behind.

 

  • Once in a while, build a case for the exact opposite of what you think is true: This encourages critical thinking and the ability to understand different perspectives. If you cannot argue for the opposite of your beliefs, it's challenging to be certain of their validity. This practice also helps in anticipating competitors' moves.

 

  • Recognize we have become an age of makers and builders and creators, and try to make, build, create something that's really important: Highlights the shift towards a more creative and constructive economy and the importance of contributing through creation.

 

Remember:

“To thrive in an AI age we will have to upgrade our HI ( Human  Inspiration) to complement and enhance our impact. The future is AI + HI” -  Rishad Tobaccowala

 

Watch Rishad’s Keynote Talk

Nugget of Next: 

Subscribe to Rishad’s regular Sunday Post, I enjoy reading them every Sunday. 

Read and subscribe to Rishad’s Posts

CTA:
For Enterprise Architect SAP Community Updates and More: Connect with and Follow Paul Kurchina - https://www.linkedin.com/in/paulkurchina/ 

 

Flag Photo:

* This was our first Flag Photo with the group, we had a minor adjustment to make for future photos

entry.title: Re: CVI Conversion - Precheck master data errors
entry.content:
When encountering number range overlapping errors during a brownfield conversion from ECC to S/4 HANA, it's essential to address them promptly to ensure a smooth transition. Here's a step-by-step guide on how to resolve such errors:

1. Identify Overlapping Number Ranges:

  • Review the precheck master data error report to identify the specific number range objects and intervals that are overlapping.

2. Analyze the Cause:

  • Investigate why the number ranges are overlapping. Common reasons include:
    • Incorrect configuration of number range intervals.
    • Changes in business processes leading to overlapping ranges.
    • Manual adjustments made without updating number range settings.

3. Assess Impact:

  • Evaluate the impact of overlapping ranges on existing and future transactions, data integrity, reporting, and compliance.

4. Determine Solutions:

  • Depending on the cause, decide on appropriate solutions:
    • Adjust Number Range Intervals: Modify the intervals of overlapping number ranges to ensure uniqueness.
    • Realign Business Processes: Align business processes to prevent overlapping ranges in the future.
    • Data Cleanup: Review and rectify any inconsistencies caused by overlapping ranges in existing data.

5. Engage Stakeholders:

  • Collaborate with relevant stakeholders, including business process owners and IT teams, to validate proposed solutions and ensure they meet business requirements.

6. Test Solutions:

  • Before implementing changes in the production environment, conduct thorough testing in a sandbox or development environment.
  • Verify that the proposed solutions effectively resolve the overlapping range errors without introducing new issues.

7. Implement Changes:

  • Once testing is successful and stakeholders approve the solutions, implement them in the production system.
  • Follow established change management procedures and document the changes made.

8. Monitor Post-Conversion:

  • After the conversion to S/4 HANA, monitor the system closely to ensure that the overlapping range issues have been resolved and that no new issues arise.
  • Address any unforeseen issues promptly to maintain system stability.

9. Document and Train:

  • Document the resolution process, including the steps taken and lessons learned, for future reference.
  • Provide training or knowledge transfer sessions to relevant personnel to ensure they understand how to manage number ranges effectively in the S/4 HANA environment.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition with BTP?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

yes that is the whole purpose behind BTP. It's meant to be an extension platform for SAP S/4HANA.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: HANA Hardware checks for Vmware
entry.content:
Unveil the prowess of SAP HANA by downloading and configuring its hardware and cloud measurement tool. This intricate process enables meticulous assessment, ensuring that the envisioned infrastructure aligns seamlessly with the rigorous system and performance standards imperative for certification.

https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_HW_CLOUD_TOOLS/02bb1e64c2ae4de7a11369f4e70a6394/8ce95324d9624405a996b28cb62ae036.html

entry.title: ABAP code of Advanced Return Management
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm testing ARM process and have a question about posting change.


Here is a test return delivery, as you can see, two outbound deliveries (posting change in warehouse) will be generated.
If I understand correctly, the first outbound delivery generates a posting change document in warehouse and then triggers goods movment.
Afterwards, the second outbound delivery is created, my question is how it is created? Maybe someone could show the ABAP code here.

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: Question about routing scheduling (converting to days)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a question about routing scheduling.

(CA03 --> Extras --> Scheduling --> Schedule --> Results)

 

Would you tell me how the system converts queue time in hours to the amount in days in routing scheduling?

 

For instance we have 6 hour queue time for the first operation in a routing and 0 hours for everything else.

The waiting time and move time are all set to 0 hours for all of those operations.

(1 hour break is assigned for those work centers. Operating time is set to 6.75 hours for all of the work centers in the routing.)

 

When we have 6 hour queue time only for the first operation, the interoperation time is calculated as 0.31 days.

But we have 6 hour queue time only for the last operation, the interoperation time becomes 0.96 days instead.

In both of those cases, the total queue time is the same amount of time (in hours), but they get different amount when they are converted to days.

I don't know where/how we get those differences and how the interoperation time is converted to days.

I'd really appreciate it if you could tell me about it.

 

Best Regards

 

 

 

When we schedule operations in routing via extras --> scheduling --> schedule, we get the amount of time for inte

entry.title: The system cannot find the file specified - BP
entry.content:
The system message pops out every time the user tries to find a BP. The find function is working, but the system message is interrupting their work. It is only happening to 1 user.

Can you please advise? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP - PostgreSQL SSH Tunnel and SSH Tunneling Explained
entry.content:
HI Yogananda ,

Thanks for the detailed blog on the PostgreSQL SSL tunnel.

Our requirement is we are developing Springboot Java application through SAP BAS by enabling PostgreSQL instance as hyperscaller option

 

Some how we are unable to connect to our PostgreSQL instance through our Java App

We are unable to connect to our PostgreSQL Server instance through PgAdmin 4.

We are encountering connection timeout errors.

Can you help me whith any documentation on how to connect to PostgreSQL through Java in BAS.

Also let me know, does the ports disable causing issue, if so how do we enable it.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Mallesh

mpyreddy@gemini-us.com

+917989981075

entry.title: Re: Introducing the new pipeline concept in Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

Nice blog, the concept is really interesting for SAP PO migrations and responsible use of JMS queues. We have also used similar patterns for SAP PO migrations, but using a DataStore, not JMS.

Is there any reason to use JMS over the DS, for these Async Patterns, other than performance and being able to do the manual retry from the queue?

It would be really interesting to elaborate a bit on that.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Integrate Solman and ServiceNow using SAP CPI or PO as middleware.
entry.content:
There is a requirement to Integrate Solman with ServiceNow using a middleware. SNMP Trap is being used at the Solman side. Is it possible to use SAP CPI or PO in this scenario as middleware?
And if SNMP Trap is avoided, is there any different way to send data to middleware?

Any information will be much appreciated.
Thank You.

entry.title: Sales Contracts in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_order quantity restriction compared to contract quantity
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

There is a requirement to restrict sales order quantity referenced from sales contracts should not be more than sales contract quantity in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition.

In S/4HANA On-premise & ECC version , the below mentioned option (completion rule) is available to enable restriction at item category level.

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud is there an option like the above to set order item is completed after full quantity has been referenced. 

Please advise. 

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

Thanks

entry.title: automatic calculation of plan activity rates
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

Hope you are doing well,

Kindly we are facing an issue on the public cloud in the Financials-->Management accounting module-->Overhead accounting-->planning.

Where maintaining the activity quantity (Fiori app: manage cost rate-plan) doesn't exist, also the functionality of automatic calculation of plan activity rate doesn't exist.

The above requirements can be done smoothly on SAP private cloud or SAP ECC as below:

1-Enter activity output quantity (Fiori app: Edit prices for activity types-cost center) or (Tcode: KP26)

2-Perform automatic calculation of plan rates for activity types (Tcode: KSS4, Tcode: KSPI)

Kindly advise what are the alternative procedures to be followed on SAP public cloud to meet the above requirements ?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: automatic calculation of plan activity rates
entry.content:
We request you to refer the below links for more details regarding your requirement.

Help Portal Links:

Manage Cost Rates - Plan

Actual Costing

Actual Costing: FAQ

Fiori Apps:

Manage Cost Rate Plan

Community Links:

Cost Center Activity Planning in Public Cloud

Issue with Activity Quantity planning in S4 HANA cloud

Split Costs - Cost Centers - Actual/Plan Fiori apps in S/4 Hana public Cloud

Regards,
Ankit K

entry.title: Re: DUMMY_NO_REQ_CREATED error in DTP run in Process chain
entry.content:
There might be a lock because of which you are facing this failure.

Check in SM12 and delete the lock.

 

Kind Regards,

V

entry.title: Re: How can I create a column with "Direct Links" to clas...
entry.content:
Hi,

I tested more:

This is my actual sql:

Select

'https://performancemanager5.successfactors.eu/sf/learning?destUrl=https%3a%2f%2fdeutschel%2eplateau%2ecom%2flearning%2fuser%2fdeeplink%5fredirect%2ejsp%3flinkId%3dSCHEDULED%5fOFFERING%5fDETAILS%26scheduleID%3d' || a.schd_id || '%26fromSF%3dY&company=Lufthansa' as direct_link,

This select works perfectly fine in PRD, but after importing to SF, the report fails.

So I played around

Select

'Tom' || a.schd_id || 'Bill' does not fail in SF LNR

'Tom?' || a.schd_id || 'Bill' does fail in SF LNR

So I assume it is the question mark that causes the failure.

Any idea how to work around this?

Brgds., Uwe

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Service Management
entry.content:
Hello @pvsbprasad ,

Great Blog. It is really help.

What I understand from this Blog is that an Employee can create cases for himself within a company using SAP Service cloud V2. 

In Service Cloud V1, there as an integration between Ask HR in BTP with SAP C4C v1 to create/view Ticket directly in AskHR and it can be accessed in C4C. Do we have any such integration with AskHR with SAP Service Cloud V2 in the same manner for the Case creation and Display? Please help me with related blog.

 

Regards,

Pranoy Kumar

I have 3 PRs that has been marked for deletion. Also, the deletion of line item in PR was not reflected in Item Changes, the only change that was reflected is that when I undeleted the PR.

May I know how to resolve this issue? or what is the cause of this issue?

Thank you so much.

~B

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: e6ac8d77aedde4e1cec14869d6057d3a33d5e9775513167946bcc0fda76177d3

entry.title: Re: RAP: Creating a child entity with 'create by associat...
entry.content:
If you define a static factory action for the child entity, you do not get the parent keys.
When you define a factory action for the child entity, you must select an existing entity as a reference.

When you define a factory action for the parent entity, you have the parent keys, but in a standard Fiori elements app, the action button is in the header area instead of next to the child table. If the table is not refreshed after executing the action try defining a side effect in the behavior definition.

Another approach could be to enable inline creation mode for the child table. The user can quickly create new entries where the parent keys are prefilled. It's faster than clicking on an action button.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: Can you make sure that the SAP Build Apps Preview App has permission to use the camera?

entry.title: Don’t Get Fooled Into Climate Change Complacency
entry.content:
A cold snap in the Ticino, on the border of Switzerland and Italy, on the slopes overlooking Lake Lugarno, resulted in a specifically poor spaghetti crop. The last few weeks of March have been a worrying time for the spaghetti farmers. There is always a chance of late frost which, while not entirely ruining the crop, does have an impact on the flavor which makes it difficult to obtain top prices on the world markets.

Another reason for the failed crop lies in the increase of the Spaghetti weevil, a tiny creature that has decimated crops in the past. Of course, spaghetti cultivation in Switzerland is nowhere near the size of the Italian industry and the vast spaghetti plantations in the Po Valley, but a bumper or failed crop can still significantly impact the prices paid on the global market based on supply and demand.

Yes, it’s April 1st and this story is based on another story first shown on April Fool’s Day in 1957 on the BBC current affairs program Panorama (check it out here, it is well worth a watch).

 

It’s a stark reminder that if we ignore climate change, it will make a fool of us all. 

Here are a few alarming climate change examples from 2023 that are no joke:

  • When a Bomb cyclone hit California in early 2023, excessive flooding (after years of drought) affected imports, exports, transportation and damaged crops all over the state.
  • In July, India announced an exportation ban on non-basmati white rice due to rising prices and fear of shortages due to El Nino disruptions.
  • The Sriracha hot source shortage was “hot” on social media. This was due to poor jalapeno crops in Mexico, which relies on water from the Colorado river which was depleted.
  • Panama Canal water levels were also very low which is putting at risk the estimated 40% of consumer goods transported between Northers Asia and the east coast of the USA.
  • In October you could read about a sugar shortage due to droughts in India, and floods in Brazil! This was compounded by a poor sugar beet harvest in Europe.

 

Be part of the solution not the problem

It’s imperative that companies make sustainability central to their overall business strategy. To begin the process, business leaders must examine all functions of their network and identify sustainability weaknesses within and outside of their organization.

For example, supply chains are a major contributor to waste and carbon emissions and are therefore a major area of opportunity for improvements. Creating measurable goals to improve a company’s supply chain (e.g., eliminating single-use plastics within the next 18 months, or becoming carbon neutral by 2030,) can restore the confidence of customers, investors, employees and other stakeholders that the organization is making active strides to become more sustainable.

But setting goals is one thing and meeting them is another. Supply chain leaders must make sure they are accounting for and managing climate-related emissions across all parts of their supply chain (Scope 1,2 and 3), which includes suppliers, contract manufacturers, logistics service providers and other trading partners.

This is no small feat – a lack of visibility across a company’s supply chain is typically the reason why business leaders struggle to manage the total carbon footprint of products. By employing technology to provide the visibility they need to see across their supply chain, business leaders can then take actions to reduce their company’s end-to-end carbon footprint.

To learn more about how to get your business ready to enable a risk-resilient and sustainable supply chain, download the recent Oxford Economics Research.

Follow me on Twitter.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: @Nitesh1 it is great to meet you. I am based in the US outside of Philadelphia. I am curious if you have experience and / or looking to get expertise in S/4HANA Cloud? Best of luck!

entry.title: Facing issue in SAC custom widget for "onFileUpload" function
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am facing an issue in the latest version of the custom widget. The old version consists of a function called "onFileUpload" on which we could write our own code as per the requirement, but the latest version consists of 3 functions "onSuccess", "onPartialFailure", "onFailure" where we cannot write our own code.
The code I have written in the old version, as per the story requirement. For ex: When the flat file is loaded, I have written a code to check whether the loaded data is correct or not. If the data is incorrect, it will give me the pop up along with the error details and also it will display at how many lines error exists.
I want this feature to be added in the latest version of the custom widget. I have also shared the link of both the versions.
Old version: https://sap-my.sharepoint.com/:f:/p/sean_johnson/EnzjVyzswQdBoMp8QEcXIIABAG7FZuLrrRoktFfRCbUdtg?e=eU6XQy
New version: https://github.com/SAP-samples/analytics-cloud-custom-widget/tree/main/Custom-Widget-Samples/file-upload-widget#readme

Does anyone have any idea how to solve this issue?

Thanks

Arup

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
@TusharTrivedi it is great to meet you. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia. My background is with analytics and SAP BW, as well as many SAP solutions as an end-user. May I ask your specific areas of interest to engage in the community? Please meet SAP mentor (or you may know Krishna who was also at TechEd!) Krishna Kishor Kammaje - SAP Community.

Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: Get Certified: C_HANATEC_17
entry.content:
Hello @HayBouten ,

The Certification C_HCADM_05 : Provision and administer databases in SAP HANA Cloud expired on 28th March 2024.


I didn't see any new version of the certificate in list of new certificates : https://training.sap.com/certification/validity

What is the new version of this certification? 

I see the learning journey of this still exists : Provision and Administer Databases in SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Learning

and this learning journey say leads to certification.

<![if !vml]>

 

<![endif]><![if !vml]>

 

<![endif]>

 So which certification does this leads to? because I don't want to spend hours of learning time which leads to nothing.
So, please let me know  which certification to choose after learning  Provision and Administer Databases in SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Learning

Thanks and Regards,
Revanth Kanteerava

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content:
Hi @bugsanderrrors 

I have the same problem on Android. I've seen a question mentioning that this is disabled on Android. I'm attaching the link in case it's helpful: link

Correct me if I'm wrong @Dan_Wroblewski .

Thanks and regards.

Santi.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
@alucian welcome, it is great to meet you in the community? May I ask your areas of interest and product areas (where you want to learn more and help others too!)

You can find great people to engage with in the Groups!

  1. Interest Groups | SAP Community
  2. SAP TechEd - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Create Custom Field F4 Help View using CDS for In App Extension
entry.content:
Hi @SamannayaRoy ,

Thanks for this informative blog. I already added a F4 Value help in ME21N.

Now I want to filter my Value Help with Vendor code which is used in PO Creation only (when user click on F4 then only single record will come against Vendor Code).

and this is required in In-App Extensibility only because my client does not have BTP.

how to fulfill this requirement in @Sap S4 Hana Public cloud.

please suggest for the same.


Regards,

Anurag

SAP BTP, ABAP environment   SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: Re: Stay Better Connected with Your Trading Partners on SAP Business Network
entry.content: Excellent blog summing up the new much-needed feature.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Identity Services - connectivity plan
entry.content: @Istvan: I do not think this answers Sushant's question. His issue seems to be that he only has one (1) entitlement for connectivity plan in his global account (presumably not pay-as-you-go). By default you only seem to get one entitlement, which is not enough if you need to run it on two (2) subaccounts for Test and Prod like described by you. So the question would be: How can I increase my connectivity plan global quota for my global account?

entry.title: Re: Announcing General Availability of SAP Build Code: Speed up development with generative AI
entry.content: @clemrngt at the time of release of SAP Build Code you are not able to use Joule to product ABAP.  Build Code does allow for you to connect to SAP systems and consume ABAP based API's.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: Sorry for the issue .... then just post the hashed message

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: I've heard the issue on screen recordings, but can you use the camera? That has worked for me on Android.

entry.title: Navigation menu color
entry.content:
It would appear that there have been some changes in the new community edition of Appgyver that has either eliminated the ability to customize the color of the navigation menu background, text, and icons or it has moved.

Can someone please help me find it.  I could live with the background being white, although not my preference, but I need to be able to change the text color so it is visible below the icon.

Thanks,

 

Chris

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: Yes! The camera works perfectly. 👌

entry.title: Re: Create Custom Field F4 Help View using CDS for In App Extension
entry.content: Good to hear you got help from the blog. You can get it filtered into the CDS view itself. Take data source I*Purchaseorder* from type: ddls.

entry.title: Group Reporting Data Audit
entry.content:
In this blog, we are going to share with you some insights with regards to the audit feature in Group Reporting from technical perspective. In BPC NetWeaver standard model, it is possible to track transaction data change as well as activities / tasks. For Group Reporting which is part of S/4 HANA, it might be possible to achieve the similar functionality as following.

1. Master Data Change Log
    The majority of the Group Reporting master data table is delivered with "log activated" which could be confirmed via SE11 -> Technical  Settings. For example, table FINCS_BUNIT is used to store consolidation unit master data.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

It is possible to track the data change log via transaction code SCU3 if system is configured properly as per note 2437986 - SCU3 | How to enable logging in the system.

2. Transaction Data Change Log

Each of group reporting tasks will log the data posting in the log table such as FINCS_LOG_HEADER (Log Header) and FINCS_LOG_ITEM (Log Details). So it is possible to track the data change by leveraging such consolidation log.
If some tasks are enabled delta posting (majority of the reclassification tasks as of S/4 HANA 2022), which means the execution will not remove the previous populated data, then ACDOCU table itself could be leveraged to track transaction data change.

3. Activity Log

Transaction code STAD records all the user activities in the system and keep such records for three days. Such statistic log could be leveraged to track user activities similar to GRC AC feature.

Hope the above information could give you some idea on how to build custom audit program to display the audit report similar to BPC.

entry.title: Generative AI-based SAP Fiori App development with Joule directly from the business requirement
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP Build Code, operating within SAP Business Technology Platform, is an application development environment for Java and JavaScript, providing developers with a turnkey solution for coding, testing, integration and application life cycle management. It provides a simplified developer experience, AI-based code generation with Joule copilot that drives productivity, is tailored for SAP development and supports fusion development by teams of professional and citizen developers.   

This blog focuses on leveraging Joule’s generative AI features for SAP Fiori application development directly from the business requirement description(user story) prompt.

 

Business Requirement

Create an SAP Fiori application as per the requirements outlined in the user story below:

User Story

As a contract administrator, I want to create and manage contracts and ‘parties involved’ information in the system, so that I can effectively track and handle legal agreements and ‘parties involved’ interactions.

Contracts can cover a vast range of agreements, such as sales contracts, service agreements and employment contracts.

Party involved: A ‘party involved’ is an individual, organization, or entity that purchases goods, products, or services from another party, typically a business or seller.

Common attributes of a contract might include:

  1. Contract ID: A unique identifier for the contract.
  2. Party involved Identification Number: A unique identification number for the party involved.
  3. Contract Type: The type of contract (e.g. sales, service, employment).
  4. Start Date: The date on which the contract becomes valid.
  5. End Date: The date on which the contract expires (if applicable).
  6. Status: The current status of the contract (draft, active, expired, terminated, etc.)

A typical ‘party involved’ has the following attributes:

  1. Party involved Identification Number
  2. Party involved Name: It refers to the given name of a person or entity, or a label by which they are addressed or identified.
  3. Party involved Address: It refers to a physical location where an individual, business, or entity is situated or can be reached.
  4. Party involved Contact Information

Acceptance Criteria

Scenario 1: List All Contracts

Given I am logged into the contract management system, when I launch the SAP Fiori application to maintain contracts, then I should be able to view the list of all the contracts in a list without pressing the GO button. The list of all the contracts should have : Contract ID, Party involved Identification Number, Contract Type and Start Date. The list of filters should include Contract Type, Contract Status and Start Date.

Scenario 2: View Contract Details 

Given I am logged into the contract management system, when I select a specific contract from the list of SAP Fiori application, then I should be able to view the contract details and parties involved information.

 

Joule's Generative AI-based SAP Fiori App Development

Prerequisites

  • Get a Free Account on SAP BTP Trial
  • Setup SAP Build Code

1. Create a New Project using SAP Build Code

1.1.  Navigate to the SAP Build lobby

1.2.  Click on Create

Create a Project

 

 

 

 

 

 

1.3 Click the Build an Application tile

Build an Application

1.4  Click the SAP Build Code tile

SAP Build Code

1.5  Click the Full-Stack Application tile

Full-Stack Application

1.6 Create a full stack project.

Contract Management Project

 

2. Create an SAP Fiori App via Prompt

2.1.  Click the project to open it in SAP Business Application Studio

2.2.  Click the Open Guide

Open Guide

2.3. Expand the 'SAP Fiori UI Node'

Expand the 'Create an SAP Fiori Application Directly from Your Business Requirements' node. Click the Open Joule button to launch Joule's AI assistant for SAP Fiori tools.

Joule's SAP Fiori Tools Generative AI

2.4. Send requirement prompt to Joule

Prompt the user story description(refer to Business Requirement section above) to Joule and click send.

Send business requirement description to Joule

Joule now checks the input against the list of features it supports and implements them.

Joule's artifacts creation based on prompt

Click Show Result to review the generated artifacts. If fine, accept the changes to generate the project in your file system.

Accept Project Files

2.5. Preview the generated application

Click run and debug.

Run and Debug

The application's preview is displayed.

Application Preview

Launch the contract management app.

Contract Management

Select a contract from the list to view its details.

Select Contract

Contract details

Conclusion

Joule's SAP Fiori tools generative AI can really expedite the SAP Fiori development by directly translating the business requirements into an SAP Fiori elements application containing a list report and one or two object pages as part of a CAP project. The generated application can further be adapted to accommodate more complex functionalities.

With SAP Build Code, application is developed automatically following the "golden path," utilising SAP best practices and integrated assistance to build quickly and integrate seamlessly.

 

Further Information

SAP Build Code

 

 

Please feel free to add a comment, should you have any queries.

Best Regards,
Anuradha Dhingan

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: aaa116b1f4166f14a91f995f1df405c95660b53fe903811480646381eae6d5c9

entry.title: Re: How to add new EAN Category in SAP S4 hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

Concerning your query, you can configure different types of EANs such as in-store or perishable EANs using the Configure EAN Categories app.

Procedure:

1. In the Configure EAN Categories app, choose Create.
2. Enter a unique ID for the EAN category. You can enter up to 2 characters.
3. Enter a description. You can enter up to 250 characters.

Results:

The configured EAN category can be selected for material in the Basic Data section of the Manage Material app.

For more information on this subject, use the information in the official documentation "Configure EAN Categories".

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Other options for native menu icons
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

When creating a native navigation menu, the icons available to select are only from the family "Font Awesome" but inside the builder we can use other families, is there a way to use the native menu with different families or a plan to add those families later?

If we could use total custom icons that we upload it would be awesome.

Best Regards

Joseph Rezende

entry.title: Unleashing AI Magic: Building Full-Stack Apps with SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP Build Code is a turn-key environment for coding, testing, integrating, and managing applications by bringing together key design time, runtime services and tools in one single offering.
It introduces an end-to-end integrated solution where SAP technologies and AI combine, greatly enhancing the productivity of developers.
With SAP Build Code, developers can build rapidly using AI code generation with Joule copilot.
Refer to this blog - link for more details on SAP Build Code and the features it provides.

Motivation

SAP Build Code has garnered a lot of attention since its release this week and I was curious to try out what all it has to offer. So here I am, sharing with you how I leveraged SAP Build Code to create two different full stack applications with just a few clicks and prompts.

Getting Started

Pre-requisites
SAP BTP sub-account with SAP Build Code set up. Boosters are available for setting it up on BTP Trial Account.
Additionally, if you want to deploy the application, you need the Cloud Foundry runtime environment.

Creating the project

  1. Click on SAP Build Code under Instances and Subscriptions in the BTP sub-account and navigate to the lobby. Click on Create.
  2. Select Build an Application -> SAP Build Code -> Full Stack Application.
  3. Enter Project Name, Namespace and Service Name.
    Select the dev space for Full Stack Application.
  4. Click on the newly created project.

Creating the application using Business Application Studio

  1. Once inside the Business Application Studio, click on the Joule icon in the left navigation bar and click on Open Guide.
  2. You can now see a detailed approach to Generative AI Powered development.

     

Now, there are 2 ways you can go about this.

  1. Using the option SAP Fiori UI from Generative AI Powered Development, you can provide your business requirements in natural language and Joule generates the entire source code for your business app in one go. You can accept the entire code and can later make adjustments using AI / through minimal coding to get the desired outcome or, alternatively ask AI to regenerate the code for you.
    Refer to this video to watch how I created a Product Orders Management App to demonstrate this approach.

  2. You can go step by step creating the CAP data model and service first, then the sample data and app logic, add some test cases and then create the UI using templates. To demonstrate this approach, I will be creating a Library Management App.
    (See detailed instructions below)

    Data Model and Service Creation -

    Click on Open Joule.
    Describe the CAP models/entities that you want to create as an input to Joule. For example -

    "Create an app for library management system for students. It should have entities - books, authors, students. Books should have issueDate, publicationDate and genre. Students must have studentId, phone and email. Books are issued to students and have author."

    Check the output created by Joule and if satisfied click accept.
    You can edit the prompt and ask Joule to regenerate again.
    You can also copy the code snippet and paste it in the schema.cds file.
    Check the sample data created in the db folder and also the service.cds file for the service entities created. 

    Sample Data Generation - 

    Although sample data is created by default, you can ask Joule to create sample data for you based on your needs.
    Click on Open Joule under Sample Data - > Generate Sample Data.

     

    Describe the sample data you want from Joule.
    You again have the options to either accept the sample data generated or ask Joule to regenerate.
    At any point of the app creation, you also have the option to enhance the sample data.
    Go to Sample Data Editor and click on Enhance.
    This will again open the Joule Assistant.
    Enter the enhancement you need.
    For example - 
    Make sure email ids of students are @smu.com.


    Application Logic - 

    We will be creating logic to tag new books published in the current year with “-- NEW ARRIVAL”.
    The logic will be triggered every time the books are fetched/read.

    Click on Create Application Logic under Application Logic.

    Click on Open CDS Graphical Modeler.
    To the books service, click on Add Logic.
    Select Service entity Books.

    No action / function.

    Name the App Logic – tag-newbooks.

    Click on Add.

    Select, the Phase – “After”


    Select the Standard Event – Read.

    Next, click on Open Code Editor, and click on Application Logic.
    We will ask Joule to now add application logic.

    Use input – "Create logic to add "-- NEW ARRIVAL” to the name of books." which are published in current year."

    Accept if you are satisfied with the result and app logic files will be created for you under the folder srv/code.

     

    Run your application using cds watch and you will be able to preview your application in the browser.


    Unit tests - 

    Let's be honest, writing unit tests is not the most liked part of development.
    SAP Build Code is a saviour when it comes to that.
    (Yes, you heard that right, it can create unit tests for you.😍)

    Go to “Create Unit Test” under Generative AI Powered Development and click on Open CDS Graphical Modeler.
    Select the app logic created earlier for books service and click on Unit test.

     

    It takes us to the Joule assistant where I will continue with the default input provided.

    "Generate a unit test case for my application logic".

     

    Once you accept the test case generated, it updates the code in the test file.

     

    Run the test and it should be successful.

    If not, update the tests as needed.

    UI Application - 

    SAP Build Code provides predefined templates for UI and a wizard based approach.

    Under UI applications in the story board, click on +.
    Specify a name, display name for your application and click on Next.
    You can create template based web applications that can launched in the browser or create native iOS / android apps.

    Select the first one and click on Next.
    Select from a list of templates, I am choosing the first one which is List Report Page and click Next.
    Select the Main Entity and fill in other details as needed and click on Finish.
     
    The UI app is now created and linked to the service.
     
    Run the application again and in the browser you can additionally now see a web app link.

    Click on that, and you are redirected to the list report page with the list of books displayed.

     

     

Voila! With that we have created our full stack application that we can now deploy and run in production.
How cool! Isn't it!
Build Code can also be used for Fusion Development where business experts/citizen developers and professional developers can collaborate to create business applications.


Have you tried out SAP Build Code yet?
Share your thoughts in the comments section.

entry.title: 入門！SAP Analytics Cloud for Planning 機能紹介シリーズまとめ
entry.content:
本ブログシリーズはSAP Analytics CloudのPlanning機能をこれから学ぶ方を対象とし、予算計画などの一連の予算管理業務に必要なSAP Analytics Cloudのそれぞれの機能の特徴や要点をご紹介します。

ブログは随時追加予定です。（最終更新 ‐ 2024/4/1）
是非、このページをブックマークして、定期的にチェックしていただけると嬉しいです。

※機能の分類については一例です。

※SAP Analytics Cloudの基本操作やPlanning機能紹介シリーズ以外のSAP Analytics Cloudに関するBlogをチェックしたい場合には、併せてSAP Analytics Cloud関連ブログまとめもご覧ください。

SAP Analytics Cloud for planning基礎

  • SAP Analytics Cloud for planning概要：SAP Analytics Cloud for planningの全体像および特徴（2024/4/1）
  • モデルの設計：データの格納先であるキューブの設計（今後追加予定）

計画入力/シミュレーション

  • マニュアル入力：データの表示と計画値のハンド入力（今後追加予定）
  • データロック：計画作業で変更できないデータ領域の設定（今後追加予定）
  • データチェック（バリデーションチェック/誘導）：入力可能な項目の組み合わせのチェックと誘導（今後追加予定）
  • バリュードライバーツリー：KPIツリーを利用したドライバーベースの計画およびシミュレーション（今後追加予定）
  • 予測：過去データに基づく予測計画およびシミュレーション（今後追加予定）

データ加工/処理

  • データアクションとマルチアクション：割当や通貨換算などの計算処理ステップの順次処理機能（今後追加予定）
  • 割当：配賦の設定（今後追加予定）
  • 通貨換算：通貨換算の設定（今後追加予定）
  • 高度な式：スクリプトを利用した柔軟な計算処理の設定（今後追加予定）

計画タスク管理（ワークフロー）

  • コメント入力：ユーザ間のコラボレーションのためのコメント機能（今後追加予定）
  • カレンダー：タスクおよびワークフロー管理（今後追加予定）

システム管理

  • ユーザ管理/権限管理：アプリケーション機能、コンテンツ利用、データアクセス等に関するセキュリティ設定（今後追加予定）
  • 監査：トランザクションデータの変更履歴の記録（今後追加予定）

拡張

  • スクリプト：JavaScriptによるレポートおよび計画入力画面の拡張（今後追加予定）

 

※機能の詳細ついてはSAP Help Portalをご参照ください。

※ SAP Analytics Cloudは、四半期に１度のペースで製品のバージョンアップが実施されます。そのため今後のバージョンアップにより、本ブログで紹介する画面キャプチャや、操作が異なる可能性があることをご了承ください。

entry.title: 入門！SAP Analytics Cloud for planning 機能紹介シリーズ SAP Analytics Cloud for planning 概要
entry.content:
本ブログシリーズはSAP Analytics CloudのPlanning機能をこれから学ぶ方を対象とし、予算計画などの一連の予算管理業務に必要なSAP Analytics Cloudのそれぞれの機能の特徴や要点をご紹介します。

※機能の詳細ついてはSAP Help Portalを参照ください。

※ SAP Analytics Cloudは、四半期に１度のペースで製品のバージョンアップが実施されます。そのため今後のバージョンアップにより、本ブログで紹介する画面キャプチャや、操作が異なる可能性があることをご了承ください。（本ブログは2024年1月に作成しています。）

SAPのData ＆ Analyticsソリューションの全体像

SAP Analytics Cloudはデータの分析・可視化を行うBI機能、予算の計画・管理を行うPlanning機能、機械学習を活用したPredictive機能を一つのプラットフォームとして提供しています。例えばplanning機能を利用して立てた予算と実績のデータを合わせてBI機能で予実差異の分析を行うダッシュボードを作成する、分析にあたってはPredictive機能を利用して予実差異の原因を自動提案させる、そして分析結果をもとに今後の見込を作成するという形で、それぞれの機能をシームレスに組み合わせてお使いいただけます。
SAPでは企業全体で整合性のとれた業務プロセスを実現するERPとしてSAP S/4HANA、そしてS/4HANAやその他のSAPシステム、SAP以外のシステムからデータを集約するデータウェアハウスとしてSAP Datasphereを提供しており、SAP Analytics CloudはS/4HANAとDatasphereの双方に対してアクセスし、データを活用することが可能です。

本ブログシリーズでは予算管理を行うSAP Analytics Cloudのplanning機能についてご紹介します。

 

SAP Analytics Cloud for planningのソリューション全体像

SAP Analytics Cloud for planningでは予算管理に必要な機能を網羅しており、予算管理業務をクラウドで一元化することで業務を効率化します。

SAP Analytics Cloud for planningでは予算のもとになる実績データの情報収集から、トップダウンのガイドライン提示、ガイドラインに従ったボトムアップでの予算の入力、入力後のデータの集計や按分処理、予算のバージョン比較やシミュレーションを行い予算を最終化、そして立てた予算をもとに業務を行った結果として業務システムから収集した実績データと合わせて予実管理や今後の予算修正という一連の業務プロセスをカバーしています。

 

各業務プロセスやタスクに必要な機能も網羅しています。
各機能の概要と要点については以下のまとめページ（入門！SAP Analytics Cloud for planning機能紹介シリーズまとめ）から各ブログをご確認ください。

 

SAP Analytics Cloud for Planningによる予算管理の流れ・全体像

SAP Analytics Cloudのコンテンツはデータを格納する箱である「モデル」とレポートやダッシュボード、予算入力画面を作成する「ストーリー」から構成されます。
モデルはディメンション（分析軸）やメジャー（金額や数量などの評価項目）で構成され組織階層や会計年度、権限などを管理します。
そのモデルに対して、ストーリーで作成した予算入力画面またはExcelインターフェース（SAP Analytics Cloud add-in for MS Office）から予算の入力を行います。また計画策定に必要なデータをS/4HANA等の他システムやファイルからインポートすることも可能です。
そしてモデルに蓄積されたデータをストーリーで自由に画面を設計して予算集計や業績管理、予実差異分析、シミュレーションに使っていただくことができます。

 

SAP Analytics Cloudの特長を活かした使い方

SAP Analytics CloudはIT部門や導入ベンダーによる構築だけではなく、業務ユーザがセルフサービスで直接作成、運用していただくセルフサービスBI・Planningとしてご利用いただくこともできます。
他システムとのデータの接続やモデルの作成などのデータの準備はIT部門や導入ベンダーが事前に行い、それを利用して業務ユーザ自身で業務に必要な分析や計画入力のための画面を作成、利用していただくことも可能です。

 
またSAP Analytics CloudではSAPデータソースとの連携を含む事前定義済みのレポートテンプレートとして「ビジネスコンテンツ」をご提供しています。

S/4HANAとSAP Analytics Cloudを利用した統合財務計画(Integrated Financial Planning for SAP S/4HANA)のテンプレートではS/4HANAのマスタデータや実績データを利用した計画を行うことができ、営業費用計画や販売計画等を順次行い、財務諸表計画に統合するプロセスをご用意しています。
一からコンテンツを作成していただくことも可能ですが、ビジネスコンテンツを利用していただくことでテンプレートを利用した構築やテンプレートをもとに各社様の要件に合わせて一部修正して使うなど効率的な導入を行っていただくことも可能です。

Integrated Financial Planningの詳細はこちらをご覧ください。

 

最後に：SAP Analytics Cloud for planning のポイント

ここまでご紹介したSAP Analytics Cloud for planningのポイントをまとめると以下です。

  • BI/Planning/Predictive 三位一体
    予算管理業務に必要な機能を網羅している上、一つの製品で分析と予算管理及び機械学習の利用が同時に可能
  • SAP製品との親和性とテンプレート
    接続性はもちろん、各種SAPアプリケーションに応じたビジネスコンテンツ（テンプレート）も提供
  • 既製服アプローチ、オーダーメイドアプローチ、セミオーダーアプローチ
    ➀ ビジネスコンテンツを利用した既製服アプローチ、② 要件ごとにカスタマイズされたオーダーメイドアプローチ、③ ➀②をハイブリッドにしたセミオーダーアプローチ、が可能。
  • セルフサービスBI/PlanningとITアプローチのハイブリッド
    業務部門主導での開発/運用が可能だが、IT部門管轄での作り込んだアプリケーション開発/運用も可能

 

今回はSAP Analytics Cloud for planning概要のご紹介でした。SAP Analytics Cloudは予算計画などの一連の予算管理業務に必要な機能を備えており、本ブログシリーズではそれぞれの機能の特徴や要点をご紹介しています。

こちらのリンクからご参照ください。

entry.title: How to read MPL attachments from odata api as part of exception handling in SAP CI
entry.content:
Hi,

Scenario:

We are trying to post data to S4 OData api from sap CI and we want to test the exception handling part whenever there is failure in data posting to S4 . The error has to be captured and sent as a mail alert. 

I can see that CamelExceptionCaught contains error message as "Bad Request 400", but I need the actual error message, like "No delivery available for update".

In the OData Response body attachments i can see the actual error reason, but its not getting stored anywhere in the header or properties.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: Make sure your entered your community ID - gphadnis2000 as well as the correct phrase. If you click the correct button, you will see the phrase and it will enter it properly in the string to hash. Make sure no trailing spaces.

entry.title: Re: Bar Code Scanning in SAP ByD
entry.content:
Very well described process Sankaran!

There is also a status column in the bar code input called Approved.....If we manually enter the barcode it shows as not approved. can you pls let me know how to do the scanning for each product ID? I tried your process but system doesn;t accept manually entered bar codes shows as not approved.

Currently we are using the bar code only per delivery but researching more for detailed scanning.

entry.title: Send to spool any ty of GOS attachment (ABAP)
entry.content:
Hello guys.

I've been searching for a week in forums for some way to send to spool GOS attachments(xlsx, pdf, txt, jpg) using ABAP code. Nothing works well. 

I have a PM order with some attachments. I need to print these documents at once. 

Any suggests?

entry.title: Re: ODBC 18 Driver - Invalid Argument for Database
entry.content: @DonWilliams, I have PM'd you the files you requested... just want to make sure you saw that 🙂

entry.title: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal (Cloud)
entry.content:
Olá, pessoal

O governo brasileiro publicou a nota técnica 2023.004 v1.10-SEFAZ, que disponibiliza a inclusão de campos e alteração de campos existentes e regras de validação para os grupos Documentos de Importação, ICMS e Informação de Pagamento para nota fiscal eletrônica (NF-e). Clique aqui para versão em inglês.

Nesse blog post, abordaremos sobre atualizações referentes aos campos adicionados e alterados disponíveis para SAP S/4HANA Cloud:

Novos campos adicionados ao sistema

Grupo de Documentos de Importação

Foi adicionado o novo campo CPF Number à tabela Nota Fiscal Data for Import Documents.

 

Grupo de ICMS

O novo campo Exempted ICMS value deduction from the nota fiscal total foi adicionado à tabela existente Nota Fiscal line items. Esse indica se o valor ICMS isento é deduzido.

 

Grupo de Informações de Pagamento:

Os novos campos Payment Recipient CNPJ, Payment terminal identifier , Payment Date , Payment Transactional CNPJ e Region of the establishment's CNPJ where the payment is made foram adicionados à tabela existente Payment Information.

 

Mudanças em campos já existentes no sistema

O campo Authorization Number na Payment Information table agora suporta até 128 caracteres.

 

No grupo, foi adicionada a seguinte entrada no intervalo de valores do campo Process Origin Indicator:

  • 4-CONFAZ

 

Também foram adicionadas novas entradas ao intervalo de valores do campo Type Of Concession Act:

  • 14-SINIEF Adjustment
  • 15-ICMS Agreement

 

As alterações mencionadas neste blog post estão disponíveis nos seguintes objetos do sistema para SAP S/4HANA Cloud:

  • Create Nota Fiscal app
  • Change Nota Fiscal app
  • Display Nota Fiscal app
  • Additional Data for Nota Fiscal Cloud BAdI

Gostou desse post? Dê um Like e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas. Fiquem à vontade para deixar um feedback, comentário ou pergunta no espaço abaixo.  E não esqueça de seguir a tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Logistics for Brazil na SAP Community para ficar ligado nas últimas notícias. 

Um abraço, 

Luize Boyen

entry.title: Re: SAP Gateway ignored the filter pass by OData receiver...
entry.content:
Hello @sbandara,

It seems about credential error (Message log sys com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: Unauthorized : 401 : HTTP/1.1)

Maybe you need to check first credentials.

Best Regards,

Burak

entry.title: Re: SAP Easy Document Management Windows 11 address bar i...

problem is that easyDMS reaches end of life and maintenance, so such issues will eventually not have any solution anymore...

There is a solution on the market that replaces easyDMS :

Rgds,

Karim

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content:
We slightly revised the process so that for Android users you can run the app in the Web Preview and upload an existing image instead of taking a new image. Then take a screenshot of the web version.

  • Check out how we managed this 😸
  • This was only possible because we previously got DJ to enable CORS from the Web Preview domain.

I'M learning a lot from this challenge.

entry.title: Re: How to leverage single Emarsys account for multibrand solution?
entry.content:
Thank you for the great question and valuable insights!

@WillYoung, in addition, could you please offer further guidance and insights on handling multiple website domains with regards to Web Channel and Web Extend? I understand that configuring multiple domains is possible with Web Channel, but integrating Web Extend may pose challenges in distinguishing tracked web behavior across different domains.

Your expertise on this matter would be greatly appreciated!

Best,
Juan Cabrera

entry.title: Filtering the Events in S4 HANA on premise System
entry.content:
Hello,

We have done the Event Enablement Setup in our system (S4 HANA on premise 2022) and we are getting all the enabled outbound topics to our Event Mesh on BTP but here we will not need every event to be coming in the event mesh queue, we need to filter the events coming to our Event Mesh.
Example: For business partner we are getting events for all the business partner created but we need event triggered only for business partner created for specific country.

Question: What are the possible ways using which we can filter the events at S4 HANA side?

entry.title: Welcome to "SAP Build Apps on SAP BTP" Developer's Challenge- April 1st, 2024!
entry.content:
Hello everybody! 

Do you love challenges? We have a cool one for you!

Starting this day "SAP Build Apps on BTP" Developer's challenge where you get to try your hands on SAP Build Apps on SAP BTP "Free Trial".

What you will learn during this month long challenge?

  1. How to set up SAP Build Apps on SAP BTP free trial.
  2. How to import  SAP Build App Project
  3. How to connect to OData APIs of SAP Backend systems
  4. How to Theme and Layout your SAP Build App
  5. How to use native device capabilities like Camera

… and many more capabilities..
Follow this SAP Build Developer's Challenge 2024  discussion by our Developer Advocate @Dan_Wroblewski  on "SAP Builders Group"

Do join this Group SAP Builders Group for more upcoming weekly challenges and to stay updated on the latest developments in SAP Build Solutions area!

entry.title: Re: Create a reservation in S/4hana Cloud (stock reservat...
entry.content: You can manually create a Reservation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud now.

entry.title: Unplanned depreciation useful life not correct
entry.content:
Hey all! 

I have a question. I have a query regarding unplanned depreciation and how it affects the useful life on the coming years of depreciation. 

Let's just take an example so it is easier for you to understand my issue.

01.01.2024: An asset is acquisitioned for the value of 1 000 000 EUR. The useful life of this particular asset is 30 years and based on that the depreciation is calculated. The asset is set to be depreciated for 33 333 per year during 30 years, and it will end 2054.

01.01.2024: We decide to do an unplanned depreciation of 200 000 EUR reducing its value. My question here is why in "comparison" tab the depreciation for the upcoming years is not changed? It will still depreciate 33 333 EUR, which will result that end of life will be earlier than 2054. 2048 will the end of life be for this asset.

Please support me on this. Is there any configuration that is wrong and why is it now adjusting the upcoming years for depreciation? I use depreciation key LINK (straight line from acquisition value).

entry.title: Re: About the help portal variance of Extension Ledger, S...
entry.content:
Hi @satoko_nakayama,

Please note that SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition are totally different products.

The Cloud Mindset is one of the most important guiding principles while implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, therefore, there are some considerations that you need to analyze. For instance, you cannot add ledgers after the initial scoping is finalized, and you cannot remove activated ledgers.

Please review in detail the following documentation that also includes guidance about asset accounting:

  • Ledger Scenarios: Choosing the Right Combination for Your Business Needs
  • Assign Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company Codes

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: Re: SAP object W3MI "XXXX" cannot be assigned to package "xxxx" error in sap
entry.content: Estou com o mesmo problema, nao consegui achar a soluação.

entry.title: Re: Generative AI-based SAP Fiori App development with Joule directly from the business requirement
entry.content: That’ great. Does is also support RAP? Or currently only support CAP?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports bug suppressing a box (suppress formula)
entry.content:
Hi Patrick, I have the report. odd thing is when I first opened the report it popped up a message indicate not supported. I then click on Design and then preview and the report worked.

I then closed the report and CR asked if I wanted to save the changes???? Opened it again and now it works... very odd.

CR seemed to have fixed the report.

I'll send it off to R&D and see if they can find anything...

Thanks again

Don

entry.title: Re: Navigation menu color
entry.content: I have the same need, as far as i know you can only change the icon in the native menu, if you make a custom menu you can change all parameters, but in my opinion the custom menu is very hard to work with

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: I updated the skeleton app so that if you’re on the web it will ask you for an image in your laptop. But you’ll have to download and load the revised app.

entry.title: update number point indicator with input field filter
entry.content:
Hello ,

I have created an input field filter for a table and the code is as follows:

var Input= this.getValue();
var i=0;
var res=Table_1.getDataSource().getMembers("ZPEDIDO");
var filter_data = [""];


if (Input === "") {
Table_1.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("ZPEDIDO");
} else {
for (i = 0; i < res.length; i++) {
if (res[i].description.startsWith(Input)) {
filter_data.push(res[i].description);
}
}
Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("ZPEDIDO", [Input]);
}

but I have a problem, that this is only filtering the values of the table but not the numerical point indicators like the following image,

I would like to know if it is possible to filter the numerical point indicators according to an input field filter? How could I adapt it to my current code? Thanks
